Not Connected
API Key (Token)
Stored locally in your browser — never sent anywhere except directly to Samsara's API (api.samsara.com). Get your token from Samsara Cloud → Settings → API Tokens.
⚠️ CORS Required: Samsara's API blocks direct browser requests. Run a tiny local proxy first — takes about 30 seconds.
Option A — Node.js (Recommended)
Requires Node.js (nodejs.org). No npm install needed.
  1. Download proxy.js from files provided
  2. Open a terminal in that folder
  3. Run: node proxy.js
  4. You'll see "🛰️ Samsara Proxy — RUNNING"
  5. Enter proxy URL below and click Save
Option B — Python 3
Already on most Macs/Linux. No installs needed.
  1. Download proxy.py from files provided
  2. Open a terminal in that folder
  3. Run: python3 proxy.py
  4. You'll see "🛰️ Samsara Proxy — RUNNING"
  5. Enter proxy URL below and click Save
Proxy URL (default: http://localhost:3377)
⚪ No proxy configured — direct API calls (may hit CORS)
Click "Sync All" to pull live data from Samsara.

Company Cut Breakdown
Driver Split CW Gross CW Company Cut MTD Gross MTD Company Cut YTD Gross YTD Company Cut
Notes
"Company Cut" is calculated as Gross × (1 − Split) for owner-operators. Example: split 80% → company cut 20%.
For Company Drivers (marked [CO]), the company cut is Gross − Driver Pay − Costs (the net profit to the company).
If a load has a stored split, we use that. If not, we use that driver's split override; if none, we use the global default split in Settings.
Global

Defaults & Fuel
Applied to all drivers unless overridden individually in the Per Driver section.
Default Split % (0.80)
Default Target Net / Week
Fuel Price ($/gal)
MPG
Maintenance ($/mi)
Default Tolls ($/mi) — auto-applies when no manual toll is entered
Leave at 0 to disable. When set, applies to loaded + deadhead miles on loads with no manual toll entry. Current rate: $0.10/mi
Default Insurance ($/mi) — global default for per-mile drivers
Used when a driver is set to per-mile insurance and has no personal override. Current rate: $0.07/mi
Loads per Week
Tax Rate (0.25)

Global split and target net are defaults — you can override per driver in the Pay Structure pane below.

Google Maps API
Used to auto-calculate loaded and deadhead miles in the load form and Load Simulator. Get a free key at console.cloud.google.com — enable the Routes API and Geocoding API.
Not connected
API Key

Key is stored locally in your browser only — never sent anywhere except Google's API directly.

Fixed Weekly Costs
These costs are saved per driver and split across loads using the "Loads per week" setting.

Tolls ($/mi) — per driver override
Override the global $0.10/mi default for this driver only. Leave blank to use the global default. Applied when no manual toll is entered on a load.
Per-Driver Fuel Overrides — leave blank to use global defaults.

Pay Structure
Override global defaults for the currently selected driver.
Driver Type
Split % for this driver
Target Net / Week
Pay Structure
Rate ($/mile)

CPM: Enter dollars per mile (e.g. 0.65 = 65¢/mi). Net shown = company profit after driver pay + costs.

Miles Per Day Capacity

Owner Operator: Split 0.80 = 80%. Net = driver take-home after costs.
Company Driver: CPM, flat per load, or weekly salary. Net = company profit after paying driver + costs.

Truck & Trailer Info
Track which truck and trailer the selected driver is currently using.
Truck Number
Trailer Number
Driver Status
Paused drivers show a warning when you try to add loads. Adding a load automatically resumes the driver.

Status History
Privacy: this tool stores data in the cloud (Firebase). All users with login credentials share the same company data.
